summary: PWA implementation and Calls feature tested successfully. All backend APIs working (10/10 tests passed). Frontend UI verified: Landing page PWA section with install button, /calls page with stats, search, new call dialog, and 'Call Lead' option in leads dropdown. Twilio integration correctly returns 503 when not configured.
passed_tests: Backend: manifest.json accessible at /manifest.json with correct structure (name, icons, theme_color)
Backend: GET /api/calls/stats/overview returns correct structure (total_calls, completed_calls, avg_duration_seconds, analyzed_calls)
Backend: POST /api/calls/initiate returns 503 when Twilio not configured
Backend: GET /api/leads returns leads with phone field capability
Backend: GET /api/calls/{call_id} returns 404 for non-existent call
Frontend: Landing page loads with hero section and PWA install section
Frontend: PWA Install button visible with text 'Install earnrm App'
Frontend: manifest.json linked in HTML head
Frontend: /calls page loads with stats cards (Total Calls, Completed, Avg Duration, AI Analyzed)
Frontend: New Call dialog has Lead selector, Opening Message input, and Make Call button
Frontend: Sidebar navigation includes 'Calls' link between 'Team Chat' and Settings
Frontend: LeadsPage dropdown menu includes 'Call Lead' option
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test leads with phone numbers
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA and Calls feature fully tested. PWA: manifest.json served correctly at /manifest.json, icons accessible, 'Install earnrm App' button on landing page works. Calls: /calls page shows stats (0 initially), New Call dialog works with lead selector and message input. Twilio integration is NOT configured (empty env vars) - POST /api/calls/initiate correctly returns 503. 'Call Lead' option available in leads page dropdown for leads with phone numbers. DashboardLayout sidebar has 'Calls' nav item positioned correctly.

pwa_manifest.content: name, short_name, icons, display, theme_color, background_color

call_initiate_api.behavior: Returns 503 Service Unavailable with Twilio not configured message

twilio.reason: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_PHONE_FROM are empty in backend/.env
twilio.behavior: POST /api/calls/initiate returns 503 with helpful error message about missing credentials
